overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban environment beneath massive elevated highways. The scene transitions from shadowed underpass areas to sunlit streets with heavy concrete architecture, digital billboards, and moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway underpass with pedestrian walkway

events.description: character turns right to follow sidewalk path under the overpass
approaching brighter area ahead as the underpass opens up

agents.ego_description: walking steadily beneath the elevated highway, passing concrete pillars and a yellow crosswalk

notable_agents.action: character with red hair and white top walking ahead of the camera

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure casting deep shadows over the street
large vertical digital advertisement screen displaying purple and pink graphics
thick cylindrical columns supporting the overhead highway structure
pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dimly lit urban canyon beneath a massive elevated highway. Concrete support pillars line the left side while a digital billboard glows on the right. The environment is sheltered from direct sunlight, creating a moody, shadowed atmosphere with artificial lighting fixtures visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit sidewalk transitioning from underpass to open street

events.description: exits the shadowed underpass into direct sunlight on a red paved sidewalk
vehicles pass by on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sunlit sidewalk, passing other pedestrians and approaching a building with green neon signage

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: commercial building with illuminated green signage and modern facade
distinctive red colored paving stones marking the pedestrian walkway
open-air concrete parking garage with visible levels and parked cars

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the shadows into bright sunlight, transitioning onto a red paved sidewalk. A building with distinctive green neon trim appears on the right while a multi-story parking structure dominates the left. The crowd density increases as pedestrians walk in opposing directions, and moderate traffic flows along the adjacent street.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered service walkway with loading docks

events.description: enters covered walkway with fluorescent lighting and loading dock areas
approaching bright sunlight at the end of the covered passage

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow covered service corridor, passing loading docks and industrial equipment

entered.detail: narrow corridor with overhead fluorescent lighting and concrete ceiling
bright yellow industrial facade with large ventilation fans and loading equipment
service area with metal roll-up doors, cardboard boxes, and safety barriers
twin large digital advertisement screens mounted on the distant overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow, covered service walkway with artificial fluorescent lighting. On the right, a bright yellow industrial building features loading docks and scattered cardboard boxes. Ahead, large digital billboards mounted on the overpass become visible as the corridor opens toward a sunlit area.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit downtown intersection beneath elevated highway

events.description: exits covered walkway into bright sunlit intersection with massive overhead billboards
character approaches corner and slows near parked vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking through the sunlit intersection toward the large overpass billboards, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red tank top walking toward the camera

entered.detail: massive overpass structure featuring twin large digital advertisement screens displaying colorful graphics
industrial building with bright yellow facade, large ventilation fans, and pink signage reading WASTE
row of parked vehicles including a dark sedan and a yellow taxi along the curb

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a dramatically lit sunlit intersection dominated by massive digital billboards mounted on the overpass ahead. The yellow industrial building now shows detailed signage and large ventilation fans. The character navigates through moderate pedestrian traffic and approaches a corner where vehicles are parked along the red curb, with the highway structure creating strong light and shadow contrasts.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic urban corridor that transitions from moody, shadowed underpasses into a bright, billboard-dominated intersection. It begins in a dimly lit urban canyon beneath a massive elevated highway, where concrete pillars and glowing digital signs create a sheltered, artificial atmosphere. As the character emerges from the shadows, the scene opens onto a sunlit red sidewalk flanked by a green-trimmed building and a multi-story parking structure amidst an increasing flow of pedestrians and traffic. The camera then shifts into a narrow, fluorescent-lit service walkway beside a yellow industrial building with loading docks, before the corridor opens once more toward the light. Finally, the movement culminates in a dramatically lit intersection where massive overpass billboards and large ventilation fans tower over the street, creating sharp contrasts of light and shadow across the red curbs.
